sizing_rule.note: Apply full optimal f calculation to active equity allocation subset (e.g., 20% of total account). Position size = Optimal f × (Active Equity % of Total Account). Maintain inactive portion for stability and withdraw constant percentage monthly.

source_rule_text: Use full optimal f on an active equity allocation (e.g., 20% of total account), while maintaining an inactive portion, and withdraw a constant percentage of total account equity each month
